title: Bartoline Bitcote Black Bitumen Paint 5L – Waterproof, Anti-Rust, Flexible Coating for Steel, Iron, Timber, Concrete & More. Ideal for Fences, Barns, Chassis. 1L covers approx. 9–13m²
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: VERSATILE SURFACE PROTECTION: Ideal for steel, iron, timber, concrete, and brickwork; offers excellent waterproofing, anti-rust, and flexible protection for fences, barns, vehicle chassis, and more.
DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING FINISH: Dries to a glossy finish in 4-8 hours; the finish turns dull over time due to natural exposure, providing long-term protection against harsh weather.

EASY APPLICATION: Apply by brush or spray, thinning with up to 10% Bartoline White Spirit for spraying. Ensure a minimum of two coats for optimal protection, with the second coat applied at right angles to the first.
WIDE COVERAGE AREA: 1 litre covers approximately 9-13m² depending on surface porosity, offering high coverage and ensuring effective rust prevention for larger areas.

HOW TO USE: Prepare the surface by ensuring it is clean, dry, and rust-free. Apply two coats of Bitcote, allowing the first coat to dry before applying the second. Clean tools with Bartoline White Spirit for a smooth finish.
description: Bitcote is made from carefully selected Bitumens dissolved in special petroleum solvents. It provides an outstanding anti-corrosive solution for brush application on a wide range of materials, especially iron and steel. Bitcote combines easy and economical application giving anti-rust, waterproofing, flexible and durable properties. Touch dry in approximately 4-8 hours at normal temperatures with a glossy finish turning dull after a period of time due to climatic and atmospheric conditions. Coverage 1 litre of Bitcote is sufficient to cover an area of approximately 10 square meters, depending on porosity. Directions As with all surface coatings preparation is of great importance and will influence the degree of adhesion obtained and the life of the coating. All surfaces must be sound, stable and thoroughly clean and dry. Metal surfaces should be wire brushed to remove rust. Where long term protection is required an initial treatment of a rust inhibitive product should be used. Apply by brush or spray. A minimum of two coats of Bitcote should be applied, the first being allowed to dry before the second. Apply the second coat at right angles to the first. Clean application tools with Bartoline White Spirit. THIN WITH NO MORE THAN 10% BARTOLINE WHITE SPIRIT FOR SPRAYING. DO NOT APPLY ORDINARY PAINTS OVER BITCOTE. DO NOT APPLY WHERE MINERAL OILS OR SOLVENTS WILL COME INTO CONTACT. DO NOT USE IF SURFACE TEMPERATURE CAN RISE ABOVE 70⁰C. DO NOT USE ON TARMACADAM DRIVES, ROADWAYS etc.
